'''Artonian Dobolond''' was the director of [[Project Black Harvest]], which researched the [[Exogorth/Legends|exogorths]] for the benefit of [[The Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania|Adascorp]]. He cooperated with lead [[Scientist/Legends|scientist]] [[Gorman Vandrayk]] on that project.

{{Char-stub}}
